# CWE-1051 safe: billing endpoint from environment
lang: go
file: CWE-1051-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1051 mitigated: network destination loaded from configuration at startup.

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func ChargeCardSafe() gin.HandlerFunc {
	billingAPI := os.Getenv("BILLING_API_URL")
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		cardToken := c.PostForm("card_token")
		req, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodPost, billingAPI, nil)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		req.Header.Set("X-Card-Token", cardToken)
		resp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadGateway, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		defer resp.Body.Close()
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": resp.Status})
	}
}
